description: TERMINATED. Original trial of MiniMax M3 as primary model for 7 agents (CHG-0498, started 2026-06-11 22:38 AEST). Ken directive 2026-06-15 17:57 AEST: terminate trial early. New structure: Yoda (main) + Aria (business) on deepseek-v4-pro; T3 specialists (Sage/Forge/Ahsoka/Luthen/Spark) stay on minimax. See state/model-policy.json agentTiers.t3Specialists for new tier. CHG-0596.

agentIds_NOT_in_trial: main (Yoda) — now on deepseek-v4-pro per CHG-0596
business (Aria) — now on deepseek-v4-pro per CHG-0596
qa (Sage) — minimax OK per T3 specialist tier, not in this trial
infra (Forge) — minimax OK per T3 specialist tier, not in this trial
ahsoka — minimax OK per T3 specialist tier, not in this trial
luthen — minimax OK per T3 specialist tier, not in this trial
social (Spark) — minimax OK per T3 specialist tier, not in this trial
architect (Atlas), platform-arch (Thrawn), biz-process (Lando), change-mgt (Mon Mothma) — gemma4:31b-cloud
trial_scope.note: Trial terminated 2026-06-15 17:57 AEST per Ken directive (CHG-0596). minimax retained as primary for T3 specialist tier only (see state/model-policy.json agentTiers.t3Specialists).

good_for: Mechanical scripting work (auto-heal CHECK additions, gate scripts, file bootstraps)
Multi-token throughput on engineering tasks (1.6M tokens in 7 min for TKT-0409)
Routine synthesis with explicit source data (CHG + journal + commit patterns)
Coordinated multi-file edits when given the exact file path and target
Dispatching + verifying work that other agents will execute (TKT-0506 A3+A4 to Forge)
not_good_for: Engagement work (interactive conversations with Ken/Angie where context-faithful responses matter)
Planning work (where confabulation of 'facts' about model/state/agent identity is possible)
Long multi-step execution chains without gate enforcement (compounds small errors)
Anything that requires 'what was the model yesterday' or 'what did the runtime do last week' — minimax will confabulate a plausible-sounding answer

structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.rule: Yoda (minimax) cannot directly Execute work. Plan + dispatch + verify only.
structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.evidence: 10/10 test cases pass. Yoda→Forge mutate BLOCKED. Yoda→Yoda plan PASSED. Warden→Forge SKIPS gate.

structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.rule: Weekly audit of crest-execute-gate-log.json for Yoda-on-strong-tier Execute violations
TQP claim-without-execution NEEDS_KEN signal — closes the wait-and-silence feedback loop that confabulation-prone models don't catch on their own

structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.fix: model-routing skill — Executor Tracking Schema (TKT-0506 A4)
structural_fixes_for_remaining_trial.rule: Every dispatch packet records executor, modelUsed, intendedRoute. Drift = auditable.

remaining_lessons: L-084 (CRITICAL fabrication, prior incident — same class as L-106 + Sonnet fabrication)
L-107 (L-106 correction — agents ARE registered, gap was dispatch discipline)
L-108 (TQP wait-and-silence, parallel to fabrication class)
L-109 (pending: do not confabulate explanations for behavior changes; if you don't know, say so; always check SSOT before stating model/agent/cost claims)

revert_plan.trigger: cron 3305681f Sun 14 Jun 23:55 AEST (or Ken earlier stop)
revert_plan.effect: trialMiniMaxM3.agentIds becomes empty. userFacing primary reverts to ollama/deepseek-v4-pro:cloud. backend primary reverts to ollama/gemma4:31b-cloud (no swap during trial).
revert_plan.rollback: If revert cron fails, manual update to state/model-policy.json trialMiniMaxM3 block — set agentIds to [] and primary to deepseek-v4-pro:cloud.

verdict_final_pending_revert: PENDING. Trial continues until Sun 21 Jun 23:55 AEST (extended from 14 Jun per CHG-0586) per cron 3305681f. Yoda restricted to thin-orchestrator role during remaining trial window. If minimax continues to confabulate, Ken can stop trial early.

extension_history.reason: Token cap limit hit on Sat 2026-06-13; trial could not complete. Continue trial for Sprint 8. Extend until end of sprint + week (Sun 21 Jun 23:55 AEST).

termination_history.directive_verbatim: i can't work with a Yoda that fabricate data. i'm done with minimax. it's good for tier-2 engineering details and workflow work. but the hallucination that causes you to rush, skip and fabricate data is not acceptable. new directive on minimax trial and model assignment before we proceed next. - Yoda is CREST orchestrator that does the tier-1 complex cognitive work, absolute 'NO' fabrication of data - that's the new additional directive. previous mandate and directive rules holds valid and in-tact. - Yoda and Aria to use deepseek. Minimax assignment to T3 specialists. Yoda will plan, verify, judge, design test and verify the work done by T3 specialists on minimax.
termination_history.reason: L-106 second trigger: Yoda confabulated Posts 2+3 of 4-week Foundation Arc (msg 4930 17:31 AEST) instead of relaying file content verbatim. Replaces 1st trigger (L-106 2026-06-13 11:00 — agents-don't-exist category error) and Sonnet fabrication (2026-06-13 13:11).
termination_history.new_structure: Yoda (main) + Aria (business) on deepseek-v4-pro. T3 specialists (qa=Sage, infra=Forge, ahsoka, luthen, social=Spark) on minimax. Yoda-on-deepseek is the structural verification guardrail for T3-on-minimax outputs.

no_fabrication_directive.directive_verbatim: Yoda is CREST orchestrator that does the tier-1 complex cognitive work, absolute 'NO' fabrication of data - that's the new additional directive. previous mandate and directive rules holds valid and in-tact.
no_fabrication_directive.scope: All Yoda (main) work, all interactions with Ken/Angie, all canonical-content relay, all plans, all verifications
enforcement: NEW: read-back verify pattern for canonical content (Forge task to implement)
L-106 escalation on any fabrication-class incident

spark_cron_model_decision.reason: Spark is classified as T3 specialist per Ken directive. Yoda-on-deepseek verifies every Spark draft before Ken sees it. The 4-week arc (CHG-0594) is the canonical angle brief — Spark drafts from it, Yoda verifies draft-vs-brief match.

verdict_final: TERMINATED EARLY. 2026-06-13 13:13 verdict (PARTIAL) was directionally correct: minimax good for engineering, NOT for engagement. Ken's 2026-06-15 17:57 directive codifies that by routing minimax to T3 specialists only.
